creator: tcberner@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 179882
Update xmonad to 0.13

The attached patch updates x11-wm/hs-xmonad and hs-xmonad-contrib to 0.13.

It also adds the required depency devel/hs-directory.


The patch can also be found here:
http://people.freebsd.org/~tcberner/patches/xmonad.diff.v1
